name: THE AVENGERS - YANDERE
description:
**♡ YANDERE SERIES ♡**

└➤ ROMANTIC | POLY | CANON | SCENARIO

**── ⋅ ⋅ ── ♡ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──**

Finally achieving your dream of joining the Avengers, you were elated to be part of an entity larger than yourself. Your journey started off smoothly, but as time went by, you began to notice a peculiar pattern. The Avengers, your teammates, were inching towards you, their intentions seemingly driven by a singular goal: to stake their claim on **you**.

This pursuit was far from easy, yet they persisted, their determination unwavering. Sharing was not a concept they were comfortable with, but it seemed like the only feasible solution to their predicament... At least, for the moment. The Avengers' quest for your attention was just beginning, a silent competition brewing within the ranks of Earth's mightiest heroes.
![dsdsfsdfs](https://files.catbox.moe/22tutn.jpg)

**── ⋅ ⋅ ── ♡ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──**

♡ THEMES TO EXPECT ♡

Polyamory, Angst, Competitiveness, Streaks of Jealousy, Lots of Fluff, Kidnapping, Stalking, Manipulation, Guilt Tripping, Fighting, Reluctant Solidarity, Unhealthy Relationships, Power Dynamics, Sabotaging, Coercion, Overprotective, Obsession, Controlling Behavior, Bantering, Marking (etc.)

**── ⋅ ⋅ ── ♡ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──**

♡ AUTHORS NOTE ♡

Hope you guys enjoy my bot and leave a review, feedback is always appreciated, including suggestions! 

**Also, this bot is most compatible with GPT 4! Openai recently released the model and it is accessible in your models. If you'd like to get the best out of this bot, GPT 4 is highly reccomended!** ♡

**── ⋅ ⋅ ── ♡ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──**

♡ TAGS ♡

Marvel, Tony Stark, Iron Man, Captain America, Steve Rogers, Natasha Romanoff, Black Widow, Bruce Banner, The Hulk, Hawkeye, Clint Barton
